hero.title: Too many tabs open up there?
hero.subtitle: Turn the chaos in your mind into focused flow – one thought at a time.
hero.disclaimer: Not a therapist. Not a life coach. Definitely an app, though.
value.dump.title: Dump it all out
value.dump.description: Rumination, mental load, overthinking – get it out of your head.
value.get.title: Get what matters
value.get.description: Clear action steps, a list of priorities, and scheduled work and breaks.
features.steps.title: One bite at a time
features.steps.description: Tabs digests the chaos so you don't have to. Broken into steps small enough to actually do – sized for a human brain on a bad day.
features.priorities.title: Not everything. Just this.
features.priorities.description: You won't cross it all off today. That's fine. Tabs picks your top priorities so you don't have to.
features.personas.title: Your kind of support
features.personas.description: Choose how Tabs shows up for you – as a Friend who gets it, a Mentor who reframes it, or a Manager who just wants it resolved by EOD.
features.personas.disclaimer: Results may vary. Side effects include mild clarity and one fewer 3am spiral.
modal.message: Under development. Like we all are.
modal.sub: Check back soon – or don't. No pressure.
